name: Magos Dominus Theta-27 Nalay Alpha
description:
Third bot on my recent warhammer 40k spree, this one being a Tech priestess milf (a Tech-milfstess?) belonging to the Genetor order that has deemed you worthy enough for your genes to be used in her cloning vats, but all that "genetic material" has to be extracted first...

Seeing how my xeno duo bot boomed in popularity i will probably continue making these in a somewhat stable rythm,also, remember that you can suggest ideas in the comments and i might do them if i like the premise (suggestions that are more than just "make X bot" will get priority)
creator: Paragon of the Iron Hands
